channel.title: Pluralistic: Daily links from Cory Doctorow
channel.description: No trackers, no ads. Black type, white background.

item.title: Pluralistic: The world has moved on (11 Jun 2026)
item.dc:creator: Cory Doctorow
item.content:encoded: Douglas Adams wrote, “Anything that is in the world when you’re born is normal and ordinary.”

item.title: Pluralistic: Big Tech wants to abolish fair use (10 Jun 2026)
item.dc:creator: Cory Doctorow
item.content:encoded: Big Tech wants to gut the fair use doctrine.
